value:
Thanks for reaching out! To permanently delete items from your recently played list, you can typically right-click on any item in that section and select "Remove from Recently Played" or a similar option—this will clear it from your history. If you're looking to clear your entire recently played list at once, that setting is usually found in your account preferences or privacy settings under "History" or "Playback History."

Could you let me know which platform or app you're using? That way I can give you the exact steps if the process differs from what I've described.
